title: opencode-openai-compact configuration
description: Configuration schema for the opencode-openai-compact OpenCode plugin.

$schema.description: JSON schema URL for editor integration.

enabled.description: Enables or disables OpenAI Responses API compaction checkpoint injection.

compactModel.description: Model sent to the OpenAI Responses compact endpoint for this provider.

providers.description: OpenCode provider ids to wrap, keyed by provider id.

compact.description: Internal request header used to mark compaction calls.

session.description: Internal request header used to pass the OpenCode session id into fetch.

endpointPath.description: Responses API endpoint path suffix to intercept.

compactEndpointPath.description: Responses API compact endpoint path used for compaction calls.

compactBodyKeys.description: Request body keys copied from the original responses request into the compact request.

summary.default:
Context compacted.
Following conversations will continue from this compacted checkpoint.
summary.description: Synthetic assistant text shown after a successful compact call.

retentionDays.description: Number of days to keep compaction checkpoints.

deleteOnSessionDeleted.description: Deletes checkpoints for a session when OpenCode emits session.deleted.
